name: booking-embed
description: Self-hosted, Google-Calendar-synced booking page with an embeddable widget. A cheap Calendly alternative on Firebase.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix functions install && npm --prefix web install
scripts.build: npm run build:functions && npm run build:web
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix functions run typecheck && npm --prefix web run typecheck
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run build:web && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:functions: npm run build:functions && firebase deploy --only functions
